news.paragraph: The S&P 500 is showing gains today even as Dow Jones futures fall, with market attention focused on Big Tech leaders and potential shifts in China relations. Traders should also weigh geopolitical tensions in the Middle East which may influence broader market volatility. No specific imminent catalysts like earnings or regulatory actions for the index are explicitly noted in the current headlines.
